The quiet leak

The money is already there. It’s slipping away.

You earn well — yet the dream keeps moving further out. Not because you need more income, but because money leaks out faster than it works for you. Every month without a plan, debt and interest win a little more.

Today

Earned, spent, gone

Income comes in, gets spent, and the goals that matter wait another year.

Meanwhile

Interest compounds

Debt quietly grows while your cash sits idle, earning nothing for you.

The cost

Doing nothing isn’t free

Standing still is the most expensive plan of all — and the easiest to fix.

The method

Most people manage one side. We tip the scale.

A budget tells you what to give up. A cash flow plan does the opposite — it finds money you’re already spending, aims it at what you want, then turns it into income that pays you for life.

Add to each side — watch it tip.
Your side — we build it
Working against you

Tip: tap any weight to take it back off.

Step one · we find it

Cash Flow

The money moving through your life right now. We map it, stop the leaks, and free up real dollars — without touching the things you love. That’s your seed money.

Step two · we grow it

Passive Income

The freed-up money goes to work in assets that pay you whether you clock in or not. Cash flow funds the dream; passive income keeps funding it for life.

Cash flow + passive income = maximum lifestyle in minimum time.

The engagement

Cash Flow Coaching — a full year by your side.

One year of guided implementation built around your money and your goals. It starts by finding the money — then making it work.

What’s included

  • Your personal “money found” analysis
  • A behavioral cash flow plan — not a budget
  • A full year of implementation coaching
  • The free income mini-course to grow it
  • Your goals mapped to a fund-it timeline
  • The Six Figure Sit Down strategy session

Begin with the assessment. If there’s no real money to find, I’ll tell you — you risk nothing to look.

See what we can find — take the assessment
Who you work with

A specialist, not a salesperson.

David Ivery is a Certified Cash Flow Specialist and 5-time author who has spent his career helping people get more life from the money they already earn. No product-pushing — a proven method for freeing and growing your own cash.

Straight answers

The questions you’re already asking.

Is this just a budget?+
The opposite. A budget tells you what to cut. We find money you’re already spending and aim it at what you want — you give up nothing.
Do I need to earn more first?+
No. Almost everyone is already spending the money; it’s just leaking. We find it before we ever talk about earning more.
What does it cost?+
Start with the free assessment. If there’s real money to free up, we walk through it together — and it’s built to pay for itself. If there isn’t, I’ll tell you.
Is my money locked away?+
No. This is about your everyday cash flow and the income it can create — flexible, in your control, built around your life.
Your move

Let’s find the money to fund your dream.

Two minutes to start. Take the assessment, then book your Six Figure Sit Down.
